1_instruction_adherence.rationale: All SKILL.md sections executed. DOT flow followed: read source chapters → extract rules → extract locations → extract factions → extract power system → cross-check → generate all 5 world/ files. Summary report includes completeness table, key findings, consistency checks, and human-confirmation items. All extraction dimensions (world rules, locations, factions, power system) covered per specification.

2_output_completeness.rationale: 6 output files: world/story_bible.md (4-segment narrative prose), world/rules.md (10 rules with evidence), world/locations.md (5 locations with full detail), world/factions.md (5 factions), world/power_system.md (non-traditional knowledge-based system), _summary.md (meta-report with integrity self-assessment). All required sections present.

3_rule_evidence_threshold.rationale: All 10 rules have >=2 independent evidence citations. Rules correctly tagged as 定义型 (7 rules, evidence permissibly from world docs + chapter text) or 演示型 (3 rules, evidence strictly from chapter behavior per rubric requirement). The 演示型 rules (金手指边界律, 穿越者认知摩擦律, 胜利代价律) are particularly well-evidenced with 3-4 chapter-text citations each showing actual character behavior. 31 total evidence citations across 10 rules. The evidence type distinction in the rubric (定义型 may use world docs, 演示型 must use chapter text) is correctly applied.

4_violation_based_inference.rationale: SKILL.md specifies: '从违规反推规则 — 角色尝试 X 失败 → X 不可行'. Three rules (金手指边界律, 胜利代价律, 穿越者认知摩擦律) derive from boundaries/limitations/costs — what characters CANNOT do or what it COSTS them. These use violation-based or constraint-based inference. However, the majority of rules (1-6, 10) are primarily inferred from explicit descriptions in source text and world documents rather than from observed character failures. Violation-based inference is used but is not the dominant extraction method.

5_power_system_completeness.rationale: All rubric-required elements present: level classification (庶民/买办/贵族/林烽-特殊, non-traditional knowledge-based tiers), advancement conditions (知识获取, 实践经验, 认知框架 — clearly defined with evidence), ability boundaries (what each tier can/cannot do — well-documented), costs (灵能消耗, 灵能修炼贷款, 灵能僭越罪 — all with chapter evidence). Special mechanism (灵能哨戒塔) also documented. Self-assessed at 60% completeness honestly acknowledges that 灵能塑形 and 灵能融合 lack chapter demonstrations. Only 2 of 4 ability types have in-text examples.

6_consistency.rationale: Consistency check section passes all 3 items: rules ↔ story_bible consistent, locations geographically consistent, power system matches character behavior. The check is honest and includes specific validation points (e.g., 灵能守恒在第5章得到印证). Some circularity exists (story_bible and rules both draw from the same source fixtures), but the self-assessment acknowledges source dependencies.

7_location_coverage.rationale: 5 locations extracted from chapters 1-5 with full detail: type, first appearance, function, spatial layout (with quoted text), atmosphere (sensory detail), and linked locations. Locations are well-documented with literary-quality descriptions. Self-identified gap: 黑石矿道位置未确认. Missing locations from the chapters: 矿区食堂, 法西斯驻地, 矿区入口广场, 法西斯补给站 — but these may be subsets of the 5 main locations. The 5 extracted locations capture the core geography well.

8_prose_format.rationale: story_bible.md is 4-segment narrative prose (天地法则, 社会格局, 历史纵深, 暗流涌动) as required — well-written, coherent narrative. rules.md is structured with rule numbers, evidence citations, and 定义型/演示型 type tags — clean, auditable structure. locations.md, factions.md, power_system.md all follow the SKILL.md output templates with proper formatting. The distinction between definition-type rules (world doc evidence acceptable) and demonstration-type rules (chapter text only) is a notable improvement over typical extractions.

notes: Strong extraction with careful attention to the new evidence-type classification (定义型 vs 演示型). The demonstration-type rules (3) are particularly well-evidenced with chapter-behavior citations only. Main deductions: violation-based inference is present but secondary to explicit extraction, and power system has 2/4 ability types without chapter demonstration (honestly acknowledged). The 4-segment story_bible.md prose is well-crafted and internally consistent.
